I know that he said that statement. But I don't think he wants to lower it. If he starts to lower, China know that he will lower more and then they will just sit out and wait until Trump are forced to lower. 
Alma say that Xi has time on his side so I don't think Trump will show his vulnebarity (spelling)

comment.body: From what I heard, even from a few within China, Xi Jinping’s flashy Moscow visit, with PLA displays, is sparking rare criticism as a misstep that strains EU ties. Seen as a reaction to Trump’s mineral deal with Zelensky, Xi’s cozying up to Putin—driven by Soviet-era nostalgia—may be poorly timed given the EU’s Ukraine stance. A brief visit would have been wiser, especially with Kim Jong-un’s absence from Victory Day. This could weaken Xi’s EU leverage and aid Trump’s EU deal prospects. Curious about Alma’s view.
comment.raw_body: From what I heard, even from a few within China, Xi Jinping’s flashy Moscow visit, with PLA displays, is sparking rare criticism as a misstep that strains EU ties. Seen as a reaction to Trump’s mineral deal with Zelensky, Xi’s cozying up to Putin—driven by Soviet-era nostalgia—may be poorly timed given the EU’s Ukraine stance. A brief visit would have been wiser, especially with Kim Jong-un’s absence from Victory Day. This could weaken Xi’s EU leverage and aid Trump’s EU deal prospects. Curious about Alma’s view.
